title: BEM-930 unified analytics
objective:
Create file governance/reports/BEM930_UNIFIED_DETAILED_ANALYTICS_REPORT.md with content # BEM-930 UNIFIED DETAILED ANALYTICS REPORT
Status: UNIFIED_DETAILED_ANALYTICS_REPORT_READY
Date: 2026-05-31
Purpose: unified overall analytics report with both high-level overview and detailed layers, after operator clarified that BEM-929 was too high-level and that a single complete report was required.
Correction applied:
- This is one unified overall report, not an appendix and not a separate detail addendum.
- The report includes both summary and detailed analysis.
- It captures decisions, links, prompts/contracts, object passports, provider model, registries, roadmap and quality checklist.
Key included sections:
- Executive summary.
- Mistakes of previous versions and mandatory corrections.
- Chronological map of thematic dialogues.
- Object passport structure for GD/DIR/WRK; no object prompts.
- Elements, roles and rule inheritance.
- Full link matrix: operator input, curator-to-curator vertical links, curator-to-analyst input, analyst-to-auditor proposal, auditor-to-executor approval, executor-to-auditor result, auditor-to-curator output, auditor A to analyst B horizontal transfer, runner activation and failover.
- Internal contour algorithm details.
- LLM role prompts and provider/handler contracts.
- Provider model and required registries.
- Detailed roadmap derived from decisions.
- Final protocol QA checklist.
Major decisions preserved:
- Objects have passports, not prompts.
- Workspace belongs to internal contour.
- Curator is object-level element.
- Internal contour algorithm is Analyst -> Auditor -> Executor -> Auditor with revision through Analyst.
- Vertical link is Curator -> Curator.
- Horizontal link is Auditor A -> Analyst B.
- Provider model: GPT Analyst, Claude Auditor, Claude Executor, fallback GPT-Codex/Codex.
- Telegram is operator front, not system center.
- Claude requirements are release blockers.
Local operator artifacts:
- BEM930_unified_detailed_analytics_report_ru.docx
- BEM930_unified_detailed_analytics_report_ru.zip
QA: DOCX rendered to 5 pages; no edge clipping detected.
No issue comments.
